prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-MAGNETIC-DRAWING-YELLOW Product Type: WRITING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Doodle Draw CB2010 Magnetic Color Drawing Board Kids Toy Art Play Set, Yellow Description: Is your child constantly creating or drawing?

If so this Coloring Board is perfect for them. The Magnetic Coloring Board Kit allows kids to draw detailed pictures and run wild with their imagination. The Kit comes with a Pen, Stamp, and eraser. Search Terms: tool box kids educational creative Features: - SLIDING ERASER - Just one swipe back and forth can wipe out all doodles , allowing endless times of drawing for hours of play - HIGH QUALITY PLASTIC - Made of high quality plastic, with better resilience, not easy to break - EXTRA LARGE WRITING AREA - Includes a 10" X 7" large drawing screen. Designed to encourage kids to doodle and create beautiful artwork. The writing stencils teach toddlers how to learn, to write, and draw step by step - Easy Set Up | Folding Stand | Bright Vibrant Colors - Recommended for Ages 2-13 | Stimulates Art and Creativity Learning and Play === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
